sideEffectsSummarySql:
-- Side-effects summary for stress run: manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z
-- Run via: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f - <<'EOF'

select 'external_sync_events' as table_name, count(*)::text as cnt
  from external_sync_events
  where correlation_id like 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_inventory_activity', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_inventory_activity
  where correlation_id like 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_review_queue', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_review_queue
  where group_key like 'stress:manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z:%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z'
union all
select 'webhook_events', count(*)::text
  from webhook_events
  where external_webhook_id like 'manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z%'
union all
select 'warehouse_locations', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_locations
  where name like 'TEST-manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z-%';

-- EOF
notes: inventory_sync_paused=true — fanout will short-circuit; v2-enqueue assertion skipped.
shipstation_v2_inventory_warehouse_id IS NULL — v2 push path will skip; v2-enqueue assertion skipped.
Dry run — would submit 200 rows to submitManualInventoryCounts under stress_run_id=manual-count-burst-2026-04-18T19-17-53-722Z.
